name: Glover Teixeira
winProfile: 1 Elite+ wins, 2 Top-5+ wins, 10 ranked quality wins.
shortCase: Sixteen UFC wins, thirteen finishes, a title at 42, and elite relevance across more than a decade.
bestArgument: Teixeira combines exceptional UFC longevity, major finishing volume, and a late championship win over Jan Blachowicz.
counterArgument: He won only one UFC title fight and accumulated several meaningful losses before the late title run. Longevity carries more of the case than championship volume.
whyRankedHere: Teixeira combines exceptional UFC longevity, major finishing volume, and a late championship win over Jan Blachowicz.
whyNotHigher: He won only one UFC title fight and accumulated several meaningful losses before the late title run. Longevity carries more of the case than championship volume.
finalTakeaway: Sixteen UFC wins, thirteen finishes, a title at 42, and elite relevance across more than a decade.
